feed.title: The Git Times
feed.subtitle: AI-generated newspaper for builders — daily coverage of trending GitHub projects

entry.title: AppLess Reimagines Mobile UIs as Instant, LLM-Generated Experiences
entry.summary: “Technology is not a neutral tool. It is a system that carries its own values.” — Ursula Franklin

entry.title: QwenPaw’s MCP Integration Unlocks Seamless Tool Orchestration for Local AI Agents
entry.summary: “Tools for conviviality are those which give each person who uses them the greatest opportunity to enrich the environment with the fruits of their vision.” — Ivan Illich

entry.title: Running 744B-Parameter AI Models on Consumer Hardware Without GPU
entry.summary: “Everywhere we remain unfree and chained to technology, whether we passionately affirm or deny it.” — Martin Heidegger

entry.title: Linux Kernel Maintains Momentum with Security-Focused Updates
entry.summary: “The question concerning technology is never merely technical.” — Martin Heidegger

entry.title: OmniRoute Solves AI Tool Fragmentation with Unified Free Gateway
entry.summary: “Consider what the world would lose if each mind were to do its own indexing.” — Vannevar Bush

entry.title: Tauri 2.11.5 Sharpens Desktop App Performance with Rust Backend
entry.summary: “New technology is not additive; it is ecological. A new medium does not add something; it changes everything.” — Neil Postman

entry.title: Codex Skill Automates Full Paper-Cut Ad Production from Script to MP4
entry.summary: “The information you have is not the information you want. The information you want is not the information you need.” — Neil Postman

entry.title: Terminal Multiplexer Tmux Updates with Critical Session Recovery Fix
entry.summary: “Technology is the knack of so arranging the world that we don't have to experience it.” — Max Frisch

entry.title: Astryx Design System Unlocks Agent-Ready UI Development
entry.summary: “We are what we behold. We shape our tools and then our tools shape us.” — John Culkin

entry.title: GitHub Project Decodes Windows' Hidden Global Device Identifier
entry.summary: “We drive into the future using only our rearview mirror.” — Marshall McLuhan

entry.title: OpenConnector Unifies SaaS Access for AI Agents Without Exposing Credentials
entry.summary: “The medium is the message.” — Marshall McLuhan

entry.title: Unicity Sphere Unifies Wallet, Chat, and AI Agents in One Web3 Platform
entry.summary: “We shape our tools, and thereafter our tools shape us.” — Marshall McLuhan

entry.title: A Unified Graph Maps How Children Learn Core Concepts
entry.summary: “The art challenges the technology, and the technology inspires the art.” — John Lasseter

entry.title: Jacobian Lens Reveals What Neurons 'Want' to Say in LLMs
entry.summary: “The factory of the future will have only two employees, a man and a dog. The man will be there to feed the dog. The dog will be there to keep the man from touching the equipment.” — Warren Bennis

entry.title: FFmpeg’s Silent Engine Powers Modern Streaming Infrastructure
entry.summary: “The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.” — B.F. Skinner

entry.title: GameBlocks Gives AI Agents Concrete 3D Building Blocks for Browser Games
entry.summary: “It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.” — Albert Einstein

entry.title: Developer's Guide to Running State-of-the-Art LLMs on Consumer Hardware
entry.summary: “Technology is a gift of God. After the gift of life it is perhaps the greatest of God's gifts.” — Freeman Dyson

entry.title: A Rust Compiler Written in Pure C Emerges from Years of Stealth Work
entry.summary: “For a successful technology, reality must take precedence over public relations, for nature cannot be fooled.” — Richard Feynman

entry.title: Linux Antiquity Merges Art Nouveau with Modern Desktop Customization
entry.summary: “We live in a society exquisitely dependent on science and technology, in which hardly anyone knows anything about science and technology.” — Carl Sagan

entry.title: AI Coding Agents Now Learn From Their Own Hard-Won Debugging Sessions
entry.summary: “We are as gods and might as well get good at it.” — Stewart Brand
